local n=string.len local return(function(N,R,c,a,s,k,F,X,Q,L,l,K,Z,e,W,O,b,y,M,A,S,T,H,V,t)M,l,S,T,L,y,O,Q,K,t,Z,e,H,b,V,X,W,A=function(N,n)local R=y(n)local c=function(...)return H(N,{...},n,R)end return c
